title: Enchiladas
description: Cheesy beef enchiladas with Spanish rice and enchilada sauce - a family favorite that's easy to make!
instructions: Prepare Spanish rice mix according to package directions using butter, water, and diced tomatoes
Brown ground beef in a skillet and drain excess fat
Stir in cooked Spanish rice and 1.25 cups of enchilada sauce with the beef
Warm tortillas to make them pliable
Spoon 2/3 cup of beef mixture into each tortilla
Add 1 tablespoon of cheddar cheese to each tortilla
Roll up tortillas and place seam-side down in a 13x9 inch baking dish
Top with remaining enchilada sauce and remaining cheese
Bake uncovered for 20-25 minutes until cheese is melted and bubbly
Garnish with cilantro and serve with sour cream if desired
tips: Warm tortillas before filling to prevent tearing
Don't overfill tortillas or they'll be hard to roll
Make ahead and refrigerate before baking
Top with fresh cilantro and sour cream for extra flavor
